name: KLOW Protocol
subtitle: Four-Peptide Regenerative Blend
overview: KLOW builds upon GLOW protocol by adding KPV for enhanced anti-inflammatory action. This combination lacks clinical trials on the specific four-peptide formulation despite individual component research. Standard vial contains 80mg blend (50mg GHK-Cu, 10mg TB-500, 10mg BPC-157, 10mg KPV).
mechanism: Each peptide contributes distinct biological pathways: GHK-Cu modulates gene expression for tissue repair, TB-500 enhances cellular migration and wound healing, BPC-157 upregulates growth factors for tissue regeneration, and KPV inhibits NF-κB inflammatory pathway.
keyBenefits: KPV may reduce injection site reactions versus GLOW

items.name: Wound Healing
items.description: Multi-modal healing addressing tissue through complementary pathways

items.name: Post-Surgical Recovery
items.description: Enhanced tolerability with KPV versus GLOW formulation

deliveryMethods.overview: Subcutaneous injection with rotation between abdomen, thighs, and upper arms.

steps: Clean vial top with alcohol pad
Solution should appear clear to slightly cloudy

interactions.notes: KLOW contains all GLOW components plus KPV—combining causes double-dosing
No studies on combination; theoretical compatibility based on different mechanisms
No data combining KLOW with NAD+; both affect cellular processes differently
Components may affect wound healing and clotting—medical supervision required
Multiple components affect GH pathways; risk of excessive stimulation
Components may interfere with immunosuppressive therapy

timeline.effects: Some users report inflammation reduction within days
Wound healing effects may develop if they manifest

common: Injection site reactions (common even with KPV)
rare: Signs of copper toxicity with prolonged use
stopSigns: Severe injection site reactions or infection
contraindications: No safety studies on four-peptide combination
FDA has not approved any component for therapeutic use

good: Reputable research supplier with quality control
warning: Research-only status - not approved for human use
Batch variability - ratios and purity may vary

references.title: Individual Component Research—GHK-Cu
references.keyFindings: GHK-Cu demonstrates wound healing, anti-aging, and gene modulation effects in isolation

references.title: BPC-157 Limited Human Data
references.keyFindings: Small pilot showed 10 of 12 patients achieved complete symptom resolution in interstitial cystitis

references.title: No Published Studies on KLOW Combination
references.keyFindings: Scientific studies examining safety or efficacy of the four-peptide KLOW combination do not exist

quickStats.frequency: Once daily for consistent tissue repair support
quickStats.storage: Lyophilized: Room temperature. Reconstituted: 2-8°C, use within 4-6 weeks
